description: Salesforce Data Exfiltration Campaign - Cloud-based attack with social engineering and CRM data theft

techniques.name: Spearphishing Voice
techniques.description: Threat actors initiated voice calls to socially engineer victims into authorizing malicious apps

techniques.name: Establish Accounts
techniques.description: Threat actors created Salesforce trial accounts to register malicious applications

techniques.name: Establish Accounts: Email Accounts
techniques.description: Threat actors registered shinycorp@tuta.com and shinygroup@tuta.com for extortion demands

techniques.name: Compromise Accounts: Email Accounts
techniques.description: Threat actors used compromised emails to create Salesforce trial accounts

techniques.name: Malware
techniques.description: Threat actors created malicious apps within Salesforce trial accounts similar to Data Loader

techniques.name: Tool
techniques.description: Threat actors initially relied on the legitimate Salesforce Data Loader for exfiltration

techniques.name: Link Target
techniques.description: Threat actors established an Okta phishing panel for credential harvesting

techniques.name: Cloud Application Integration
techniques.description: Threat actors deceived victims into authorizing malicious connected apps to Salesforce

techniques.name: Python
techniques.description: Threat actors used custom Python applications for data exfiltration

techniques.name: Masquerading
techniques.description: Threat actors used voice calls to trick victims into authorizing a modified Salesforce Data Loader

techniques.name: Valid Accounts: Domain Accounts
techniques.description: Threat actors used compromised credentials for lateral movement

techniques.name: Impersonation
techniques.description: Threat actors impersonated IT support claiming enterprise-wide connectivity issues

techniques.name: File and Directory Discovery
techniques.description: Threat actors queried Salesforce environments to identify sensitive information

techniques.name: Customer Relationship Management Software
techniques.description: Threat actors accessed and exfiltrated sensitive information from Salesforce instances

techniques.name: Proxy
techniques.description: Threat actors used Mullvad VPN IPs to proxy voice phishing calls

techniques.name: Multi-hop Proxy
techniques.description: Threat actors used Tor IPs for voice calls and stolen data collection

techniques.name: Automated Exfiltration
techniques.description: Threat actors used API queries to automatically exfiltrate large volumes of data

techniques.name: Exfiltration Over Web Service
techniques.description: Threat actors exfiltrated data via Salesforce API and Data Loader channels
